text.title: Solo Pivot Decision Framework Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying solo pivot decision framework end-to-end.

step.name: evaluate-triggers
step.action: Run pivot-trigger-check.sh against metrics; capture which thresholds are crossed.
step.decision-gate: If no triggers crossed, route to persevere or product-lifecycle audit.

step.name: classify-pivot-type
step.action: Use sonnet to map change to one of 5 pivot categories.
step.decision-gate: If multi-axis pivot proposed, split into sequential pivots.

step.name: disclose-sunk-costs
step.action: List sunk costs with magnitude; note explicitly that they are NOT a continuation argument.
step.decision-gate: If sunk-cost reasoning sneaks into rationale, reject.

step.name: check-runway
step.action: Verify runway_weeks >=8; if <8, switch decision to quit.

step.name: author-dr
step.action: Use opus to author the DR; apply 3-pivot quit rule if history has 3 prior failures.
step.decision-gate: If 3+ prior failed pivots, decision MUST be 'quit'.
